vacancy_details.Post Name: Consultant (Governance & Professional Development - Professional Development and Regulation)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ICSI Consultant (Governance & Professional Development - Professional Development and Regulation) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICSI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICSI Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the ICSI Consultant (Governance & Professional Development - Professional Development and Regulation) posts is 30-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant (Governance & Professional Development - Professional Development and Regulation) position at ICSI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The essential qualification for this recruitment is to be a Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant post is 40 years as of 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the ICSI Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of ICSI.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contractual positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICSI located?
faq.answer: The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110003.
